🌹
A love story, just for you
She is the Universe
& the Beginning of All Paths
"Adi en paathai thodangum idamum nee thaane...
Adi en BooMi mudiyum idamum nee thaane..."
The One Who Holds the World In every room you enter,
the air changes
Light & Shadow Even in the dark,
she is the brightest thing
Among the Wild She blooms wherever
she is planted
Presence The whole world stops
to look at you
A Quiet Radiance She carries grace
like second skin
A Moment in Time Time slows when
you smile like that
Midnight Blue Like the deep night sky —
infinite & breathtaking
Joy Every celebration
begins with you
Among Blossoms You are the rarest bloom
in any garden
Simply You The world is beautiful
because you're in it
🎂
Happy Birthday,
My Universe
On this beautiful day you were born,
the world received its greatest gift.
May every year ahead be as radiant
as the smile that already owns my heart. 🌹
Every smile
Every moment
Every glance
Every laugh
Forever
Always
❤️
Will You Be
My Love?
Every path I walk begins with thoughts of you.
Every world I dream ends in your arms.
I don't need forever to know this —
I just need you, right now, as mine.
"Adi en paathai thodangum idamum nee thaane...
Adi en BooMi mudiyum idamum nee thaane..."
✦ ✦ ✦
Happy Birthday
& Will You Be Mine?
You are my beginning and my end.
My favourite person, my favourite feeling.
I love you. 🌹
🌹 ❤️ 🌹
